_comment: COMPLETE, VALIDATED 2026 WC R32 bracket in bracket order, consumed by scripts/32_live_knockout_sim.py. Adjacent pairs (0,1),(2,3),... are the R32 ties; the tree order follows the official bracket (Wikipedia) so DP adjacency reproduces R16->QF->SF->Final.
_built: 2026-06-29 — seeds computed from actual results in data/raw/results.csv; third-place slots assigned via FIFA's official table for the qualifying combination {B,D,E,F,I,J,K,L}.
_validation: All 7 R32 ties already live on Kalshi (South Africa-Canada, Brazil-Japan, Germany-Paraguay, Netherlands-Morocco, France-Sweden, Ivory Coast-Norway, Mexico-Ecuador) are reproduced exactly, including all three third-place ties — so the seeding AND the FIFA third-place assignment are confirmed.
